overall.description: First-person exploration of a modern stadium exterior in a video game (GTA V). The player walks around the building's perimeter, passing architectural features like circular windows, external escalators, and cylindrical towers, then moves along a waterfront canal before returning to the stadium entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium exterior plaza with circular window facade

events.description: turns left to follow the stadium perimeter wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the stadium exterior, observing the circular window wall and external escalators

entered.detail: large concrete wall with nine circular dark windows arranged in a 3x3 grid
multi-level external escalator system with glass sides attached to stadium
tall cylindrical structure with textured surface attached to stadium
wide open concrete pedestrian area surrounding the stadium

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the side of a modern stadium featuring a distinctive wall with nine circular windows. The player walks along the concrete plaza, passing external escalators and approaching a cylindrical tower structure. The environment is completely empty with bright midday sun casting sharp shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium side with external stairs and cylindrical tower

agents.ego_description: continuing along the stadium perimeter, moving past the cylindrical tower toward the open waterfront area

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to stadium entrance
modern multi-story office buildings visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving along the stadium's side, the cylindrical tower dominates the view while external stairs appear on the right. The circular window wall falls behind as distant office buildings come into view on the horizon. The camera maintains a steady walking pace along the concrete plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with canal and tree line

events.description: transitions from stadium plaza to waterfront canal area with trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, moving away from the stadium toward the tree-lined canal

entered.detail: calm water channel running parallel to the walkway with stone edges
moss-covered stone wall separating the walkway from the water
row of green deciduous trees along the opposite bank of the canal

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a waterfront promenade with a canal on the left and a tree line in the distance. The stadium structure recedes from view as the player walks along the water's edge. The environment shifts from urban architecture to a more natural setting with water and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium front entrance with diamond-patterned roof

events.description: turns back toward the stadium front from the waterfront area

agents.ego_description: approaching the stadium front entrance, observing the distinctive diamond-patterned roof structure

entered.detail: large curved roof with diamond-patterned metallic facade
ground level entrance with multiple doorways and canopy structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back toward the stadium, revealing the impressive front facade with its distinctive diamond-patterned curved roof. The player approaches the main entrance while the waterfront area falls behind. The cylindrical tower and escalators reappear on the left as the exploration completes a circuit around the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey around a modern stadium that transitions from stark architectural details to a scenic waterfront before returning to the building's main facade. It begins along a concrete plaza under a bright midday sun, passing a wall of nine circular windows and external escalators as the camera approaches a towering cylindrical structure. As the camera maintains its steady pace, the stadium's side recedes and the view opens up to a waterfront promenade, shifting the environment from urban concrete to a natural setting with a canal and a distant tree line. The scene then turns back toward the stadium, leaving the water behind to reveal the impressive diamond-patterned curved roof of the front facade. Finally, the camera approaches the main entrance as the cylindrical tower and escalators reappear on the left, completing the circuit around the structure.
